Name:
Before The College Dropout
(Get Well Soon..., I'm Good..., Kon The Louis Vuitton Don)
Notes:
(06/08/1977) (Kanye West is born in Atlanta)
(08/18/2002) (Kanye announces he signed to Roc-A-Fella)
Available Length: Before Kanye released his first album to critical acclaim in 2004, he pursued many other projects, including a rap trio group named the "Go Getters" and production for other rappers, including, but not limited to JAY-Z, Common, Talib Kweli, and Scarface. Two years before the release of The College Dropout, Kanye began releasing a series of mixtapes to generate hype and publicity for the eventual release of his first album. Kanye eventually signed with Roc-A-Fella records in August 2002.

Name: Demo Beat Tape
Notes: Beat tape from September 1997.

Name: 2001 Beat CD 1
Notes: Beat CD from 2001, possibly made even earlier. Features 26 beats with some being released and some being repurposed into familiar songs. Given to rapper Hot Karl in 2001, who re-discovered it in his garage and leaked it online in 2011 as Hype Men Present: Kanye West's First Beats Disc 1.

Name: 2001 Beat CD 2
Notes: Another beat CD from 2001, possibly made even earlier. Features 19 beats. Also given to rapper Hot Karl in 2001, who re-discovered it in his garage and leaked it online in 2011 as Hype Men Present: Kanye West's First Beats Disc 2.

Name: 2001 Demo Tape
Notes: Demo tape from 2001. Leaked in 2013 under the name The Prerequisite.

Name:
The College Dropout
(I'm Good...)
Notes:
(08/18/2002) (Kanye announces he signed to Roc-A-Fella)
(02/10/2004) (The College Dropout officially releases)
Available Length: Following his signing to Roc-A-Fella Records, Kanye released his debut studio album, The College Dropout. It features string arrangements, choirs, and his signature soul sampling, frequently branded as "chipmunk soul" for its sped-up and high-pitched nature. Contrary to the popular gangster-persona lyrics at the time, his songs mostly revolved around themes of family, materialism, religion, and racism. The inspiration for finally making his music came when he was in a near-fatal car crash.

Name: The College Dropout
Notes: A very early version of The College Dropout that is composed of 15 tracks and 2 bonus tracks. Most of the songs were taken off the project. Likely early/mid 2003, since only a few songs were worked on further and there are a lot of instrumental tracks. Most of these songs found its way into the fan mixtapes series The Freshmen Adjustment.

Name: The College Dropout
Notes: Early copy leaked before the official release, featuring only 15 tracks.

Name: The College Dropout
Notes: Entertainment Weekly review copy, mostly the same as release. Has a longer intro, "All Falls Down" with ther Ms. Lauryn Hill sample, "School Spirit" with explicit lines, a longer version of "I'll Fly Away", "Last Call" without JAY-Z and an extra synth, and "We Don't Care (Reprise)" which is missing from release entirely. Tagged.

Name: 808s & Heartbreak
Notes:
(09/11/2007) (Graduation officially releases)
(11/24/2008) (808s & Heartbreak officially releases)
Available Length: Following the death of his mother due to complications after cosmetic surgery, his relationship with fiancé Alexis Phifer finally ending for good, and a struggle to adapt to his celebrity status, Kanye felt emotionally drained and lost. Kanye dealt with his pain by channeling it into a sonically stripped-down album, one dominated by his use of the titular Roland TR-808 drum machine and Auto-Tune. This album significantly influenced future hip-hop music, having influenced Drake, Future, Travis Scott, and more.

Name: 808s & Heartbreak
Notes: Early version of 808s & Heartbreak with differences in some track titles and the overall sound and mix of certain songs.

Name:
Good Ass Job
(Winter Spring Summer Fall)
Notes:
(11/24/2008) (808s & Heartbreak officially releases)
(05/??/2010) (The project shifts into My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy)
Available Length: As far back as 2003, Kanye had planned a four-album series revolving around going to college, with Good Ass Job concluding the series. The death of his mother derailed this plan, with his fourth album becoming the somber 808s & Heartbreak. People still expected Good Ass Job to release, though, as Kanye's next album as late as early 2010. When the wake of the 2009 VMAs incident happened, it would cause Good Ass Job not to release. The title seems to have changed to MBDTF around May 2010 or atleast not called GAJ anymore. The cover included for this era is the original cover for the single "POWER."

Name: Good Ass Job
Notes:
OG Filename: Good Ass Job beats for Kanye
Instrumental copy zip for Good Ass Job that was lined up for the album. Has files ranging from 2008-2010, and was most likely finished on April 19th, 2010 as that's the most recent file. titled "Good Ass Job beats for Kanye" and it's the closest thing to an official copy of the album + one of the only folders with "Good Ass Job" in the name. Around February of 2009 they started working on "Good Ass Job" and brought some work over from 2008, with development really kicking in around April 2009. The title seems to have changed to MBDTF around May 2010 or atleast not called GAJ anymore. "Runaway", "So Appalled", "Hell Of A Life", and some others were made very early on. "Blame Game", "See Me Now" and "Lost In The World" were some of the last songs made/finished.

Name:
My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy
(My Dark Twisted Fantasy)
Notes:
(05/??/2010) (The project shifts into My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy)
(07/28/2010) (Kanye announces the album title is no longer Good Ass Job)
(11/22/2010) (My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy officially releases)
Available Length: Conceived during West's self-imposed exile following the 2009 VMA incident and further influenced by his deteriorating relationship with model Amber Rose, My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy is a genre-bending masterpiece that explores the darker sides of celebrity, fame, and love. With grand production that sounds like the natural evolution of all the albums that came before it, this is seen by many as Kanye's best album, even earning an extremely rare 10/10 rating from Pitchfork.

Name: Record4Hype
Notes: Earlier version of Record4Hype, owned by @dp16 on Twitter. Seemingly untagged. Has shorter versions of "Power", "Runaway", "Monster", "So Appalled", and "Lost In The World". Has a version of "The Joy" with a CyHi verse.

Name: Record4Hype
Notes:
OG Filename: record4hype
OG Password: wewantmoney
Full zip file leaked in 2010, but was password protected for 10 years. After a number of posts by Maker reinvigorated interest, an anonymous 4chan user found the master password to be "wewantmoney" in 6 hours. The day after the zip was cracked, multiple articles came out about it, some with interviews from people involved.

Name: Thank God For Drugs
Notes:
(09/14/2012) (Cruel Summer officially releases)
(05/16/2013) (Kanye changes the album title to Yeezus)
Available Length: Before Kanye chose the name Yeezus for his sixth solo album, the name was Thank God For Drugs. Recording started in 2012 and accelerated in early 2013, with Kanye and his producers producing material very quickly. The tracklist for the album boasted 20 songs, with around 3.5 hours of rough material created for the album. After changing the album's name to Yeezus, Kanye recruited Rick Rubin to cut down this material and take the music in a minimal direction.

Name: Thank God For Drugs
Notes: May 2012 copy of the album, includes "Guilt Trip" as track 18.

Name:
Yeezus
(Nigger Cock)
Notes:
(05/16/2013) (Kanye changes the album title to Yeezus)
(05/20/2013) (Yeezus pre-orders are taken down) (Era starts here)
(06/18/2013) (Yeezus officially releases)
Available Length: Yeezus marked a complete reverse from the bombastic production that Kanye accomplished on My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy. He swapped lush soul and anthemic hooks for splintering electro, acid house, and industrial force while packaging some of his most lewd and heart-crushing tales. Initially envisioned as Thank God For Drugs, a much larger project, Kanye would play the album for Rick Rubin, he later recalled listening to roughly 3-hours of unfinished material that seemed to need months worth of work - despite the release date being a month away. Kanye enlisted Rubin to refine and complete the project, finishing a majority of the songs just two days before release.

Name: Yeezus
Notes:
OG Filename: yeezus001
March copy of the album, containing 15 tracks. 12 out of 15 tracks are currently leaked.

Name: Yeezus
Notes: An early version of the album, containing 15 tracks. It is unknown when exactly was this copy complied, but based of the fact that the latest dated song on the album is May 17, it was no earlier than that.

Name:
Yeezus 2
(Lost Yeezus, New Yeezus)
Notes:
(06/18/2013) (Yeezus officially releases)
(07/16/2014) (Kanye begins hosting recording sessions while staying in Mexico)
Available Length: After Rick Rubin and Kanye West cut down Yeezus to the final ten tracks, Kanye still saw potential in much of the cut material. Thus, shortly after Yeezus was released, an EP of leftovers titled Lost Yeezus was already being teased. The project then evolved into a full-fledged album of mostly new material, with Yeezus 2 acting as a codename before they could choose the last name. This project would develop into So Help Me God as the songs evolved.

Name: Yeezus 2
Notes: Unordered copy of the album from November 11th, 2013. Earliest known copy of "LP7" as a whole.

Name: Yeezus 2
Notes: An early version of Yeezus 2 with more songs that would either appear on The Life Of Pablo or would become songs where Kanye is a feature. Includes a track that has Travis Scott.

Name: Yeezus 2
Notes: Copy of Yeezus 2 that is said to be from April 2014 and includes an early version of The Weeknd song "King Of The Fall".

Name: YPM
Notes: A Spotify playlist created by CyHi the Prynce containing Yeezus 2 songs, titled "ypm". Track names are abbreviated. The acronym was said by REDACTED to be "Your Prayers Mattered", but there is no proof of this; it's more possible it was something like "Yeezus Paul McCartney". Leaked on July 22nd, 2022 from a $250 groupbuy.

Name: SWISH
Notes:
(06/28/2015) (Kanye performs at Glastonbury)
(12/31/2015) (Kanye drops "Facts" and the rollout begins)
Available Length: After changing the name of his 7th solo album from So Help Me God to SWISH, Kanye began to develop all new songs throughout mid-late 2015 meant for the album, with most of them eventually making it onto the final release of The Life Of Pablo. Kanye also continued to work on many So Help Me God and Yeezus 2 tracks, but by the end of 2015 and the start of 2016, Kanye had dropped most of these tracks from the tracklist for SWISH, which began to resemble the final TLOP tracklist strongly.

Name: SWISH
Notes: A copy of SWISH from November 2015 is said to exist.

Name:
The Life Of Pablo
(So Help Me God, SWISH, WAVES, ULTRA, The White Picket Fence)
Notes:
(12/31/2015) (Kanye drops "Facts" and the rollout begins)
(02/14/2016) (The Life Of Pablo officially releases)
(06/14/2016) (The Life Of Pablo receives its last update)
Available Length: The Life Of Pablo is Kanye's 7th studio album, with constant name changes before release. Sporadic and scatter-shot, the album is one of a kind. The title refers to three people: artist Pablo Picasso, drug dealer Pablo Escobar, and Paul the Apostle, whose name is Pablo in Spanish. The album was initially released only on TIDAL, but later made its way to other streaming services with some updates. Kanye finally finished it by adding the track "Saint Pablo."

Notes:

Name: The Life Of Pablo [DJDS Extended Version]
Notes:
OG Filename: TLOP - DJDS Extended Version
DJDS copy of The Life Of Pablo with extended versions of songs. Features a version of "Father Stretch My Hands" that is 1 hour long.

Name: The Life Of Pablo [Release V1]
Notes: The original release version of The Life Of Pablo.

Name: The Life Of Pablo [Release V1.1]
Notes: An early release version of The Life Of Pablo. Has many small mixing changes throughout, and notably replaces the original "She be Puerto Rican day parade wavin'" lyric on "Famous" for the "She in school to be a real estate agent" line heard in the final release.

Name: The Life Of Pablo [Release V1.2]
Notes: An early release version of The Life Of Pablo. Features an updated version of "Wolves" and seperates "Franks Track" into it's own standalone track, among other small changes.

Name: The Life Of Pablo [Release V2]
Notes: An early release version of The Life Of Pablo. There are many changes among at least 12 tracks whether that be features, length, structure etc.

Name: The Life Of Pablo [Release V2.1]
Notes: An early release version of The Life Of Pablo. This version has only a small change to "30 Hours", fixing the outro vocals which had been rendered off-time by the previous update.

Name: The Life Of Pablo [Release V2.2]
Notes: The "finished" release version of The Life Of Pablo. There are many changes to tracks compared to the original whether that be features, length, structure etc, alongside the addition of "Saint Pablo".

Name:
DAYTONA
(Album by Pusha T)
(exec. prod. Kanye West)
(King Push, Blowbama, Blobama)
Notes:
(12/18/2015) (King Push – Darkest Before Dawn: The Prelude officially releases)
(05/25/2018) (DAYTONA officially releases)
Available Length: DAYTONA is the third studio album by American rapper Pusha T. It was released on May 25, 2018, by G.O.O.D. Music and Def Jam Recordings. DAYTONA was announced by Kanye West via Twitter on April 19, 2018, alongside the album's release date. It was one of the Wyoming projects worked on during 2018 by Kanye.

Name: Blowbama
Notes:
OG Filename: Blowbama
Early copy of "Blowbama". Has 11 tracks. Leaked on 5/16/24 as part of a groupbuy.

Name:
K.T.S.E.
(Album by Teyana Taylor)
(exec. prod. Kanye West)
Notes:
(11/04/2014) (Teyana Taylor's debut album VII officially releases)
(03/??/2018) (Teyana and Kanye start collaborating in Wyoming)
(06/23/2018) (K.T.S.E. officially releases)
Available Length: In an interview with Hot 97 in March of 2018, Taylor revealed that she had been working on music with Kanye in Wyoming, referring to him as "Polo 'Ye" - alluding to him returning to his old "Polo-shirt roots" (i.e. TCD-era production). The album was eventually put on the tail end of the Wyoming releases, releasing June 22nd, 2018. Kanye was notably still finishing the album on the plane ride to the albums LP, as confirmed in a Tweet from Kim Kardashian.

Name:
K.T.S.E.
(exec. prod. Kanye West)
Notes:
OG Filename: KTSE 6.22.18 24 BIT
Copy of K.T.S.E. Made one day before release and with the release mixes. Has 9 tracks that are ordered slightly differently from release (the extra track is a solo version of "We Got Love"). Leaked on 6/9/24.

Name: Yandhi [V1]
Notes:
(06/01/2018) (ye officially releases)
(11/13/2018) (Kanye delays Yandhi again after performing at Camp Flog Gnaw)
Available Length: Upon hearing the beat to "Hurricane" during sessions for Good Ass Job (2018), Kanye became inspired to create a whole new album titled Yandhi. With the album's concept in his mind, Kanye and his producers began frenzied work as they developed multiple new songs throughout September 2018, aiming for a September 29 release date. As they did not meet this deadline, Kanye went to Uganda to conduct further work on the album, but delayed it indefinitely on November 13.

Name: Yandhi
Notes:
OG Filename: REFS
Unordered copy of the album from October 1st, 2018. Has 10 tracks.

Name: Yandhi [V2]
Notes:
(11/13/2018) (Kanye delays Yandhi again after performing at Camp Flog Gnaw)
(04/21/2019) (Kanye performs at Coachella with Sunday Service Choir)
Available Length: After Kanye delayed Yandhi indefinitely, he began working with record producer Timbaland to create "more healing music" for the album. Shortly after the announcement of the delay, Kanye underwent a sudden and dramatic conversion towards born-again evangelical Christianity, debuting the Sunday Service Choir at the start of 2019. The creation of the choir coincided with the songs on Yandhi taking a new Christian lyrical focus. Eventually, the album would morph into the thoroughly Christian JESUS IS KING by mid-2019.

Name: Yandhi
Notes:
OG Filename: YE - Previous Current Refs
Unordered copy of the album from December 16th, 2018. Has 10 tracks and Drew Falty's phone number.

Name:
JESUS IS KING
(Christ Jesus)
Notes:
(04/21/2019) (Kanye performs at Coachella with Sunday Service Choir)
(10/25/2019) (JESUS IS KING officially releases)
(10/31/2019) (JESUS IS KING receives its last update)
Available Length: Following a revelation on Easter 2019 at Coachella, Kanye scrapped Yandhi and reworked it to focus on God and Christianity. This album ended up being JESUS IS KING. After a private listening party in Detroit, Kim Kardashian announced that the album would release on Sunday, September 29, following listening parties in Chicago and New York. It didn't, and there were no updates for almost a month. On October 20, 2019, Kanye suddenly reappeared on Twitter to announce the final release date.

Name: JESUS IS KING
Notes:
OG Filename: Track List 8.30
This version of the album is the exact copy posted to Kim Kardashian's Twitter, with an extra outro by Labrinth at the end. Leaked as part of the JESUS IS KING bundle groupbuy.

Name: JESUS IS KING [Teenage Engineering Stem Player]
Notes: Copy of an earlier, unmastered version of JESUS IS KING from the Teenage Engineering Stem Player. Likely dated on or around October 23rd, 2019. Tracklist slightly differs from release. Full copy leaked November 7th, 2025, after the EAGLES 1 LISTENING EXPERIENCE in the Temu Tracker Discord server and a week of edging from ErickHatesBMC.

Name: JESUS IS KING [Album Masters]
Notes: Zip file containing JESUS IS KING masters leaked by Waterfalls. Has some alternate mixes, OG files, and some different versions of songs versions ("Everything We Need", "Hands On", etc) in 24 bit quality. Files range from October 23rd-October 28th, with most being dated October 24th.

Name:
God's Country
(JESUS IS LORD, Our Beautiful Amazing Reality, Our Beautiful Light Clear Reality, Palm Springs)
Notes:
(10/25/2019) (JESUS IS KING officially releases)
(07/18/2020) (Kanye announces his new album titled DONDA)
Available Length: Shortly after the release of JESUS IS KING, Kanye (almost immediately) started working on new material. Songs from this era revolve around his faith while also consisting of dark themes (such as prison) and lyrics about current social issues. Initially announced as God's Country on May 20th, 2020 by Arthur Jafa, tracks from this album would go on to be developed further in the DONDA [V1] era, following Kanye getting new inspiration to make an album dedicated to his mother.

Name: Palm Springs
Notes:
OG Filename: - Palm Springs - Current Refs
Super early copy of the album, titled Palm Springs. Dated around November 13th, 2019.

Name: JESUS IS LORD
Notes:
OG Filename: JIL - Fede
Version of the album from January 16th, 2020. Unordered, but contains sessions for each song.

Name:
JESUS IS LORD [E.VAX Version]
(prod. E.VAX)
Notes: E.VAX-produced copy of JESUS IS LORD from July 5th, 2020. Tracklist order is unknown.

Name:
Travis Scott - UTOPIA [Album]
(exec. prod. Kanye West)
Notes: A 17-track Kanye copy of Utopia, from 2020. Ye claimed in an interview with DJ Akademiks that 4 songs he did in Wyoming eventually ended up on Travis Scott's album. Only two snippets were previously shown to prove this copy exists, On May 3rd 2025, snippets of the other 15 songs leaked. Full copy leaked on September 27th, 2025, after a groupbuy.

Name:
JESUS IS KING: The Dr. Dre Version
(Collaboration with Dr. Dre)
(JESUS IS KING II, JESUS IS LORD)
Notes:
(10/25/2019) (JESUS IS KING officially releases)
(09/24/2020) (Dem Jointz reveals that Kanye is no longer focused on the project)
Available Length: The release of JESUS IS KING was met with mixed reviews from fans and critics. Kanye then took to Twitter to announce that he was working on a new album with Dr. Dre. Initially conceived as a remix album, it eventually grew to incorporate mainly unreleased material. During the #WESTDAYEVER campaign, Kanye did on Twitter in 2020, it was supposed to release officially, but never did. It ended up being scrapped sometime in 2020, as stated by producer Dem Jointz. Kanye posted the cover in 2022, which is assumed to be for the album.

Era: JESUS IS KING: The Dr. Dre Version
Name: JESUS IS KING: The Dr. Dre Version
Notes: Full copy of JESUS IS KING: The Dr. Dre Version from early July 2020. Features 10 songs, with features from Anderson .Paak, Dr. Dre, Snoop Dogg, Eminem, Travis Scott and more, and is fully finished. Was intended to release around June 26th, 2020 for Kanye West's "WestDayEver."

Name:
DONDA [V1]
(DONDA: WITH CHILD, DND WTH CHLD, DND, God's Country, The First Born Donda)
Notes:
(07/18/2020) (Kanye announces his new album titled DONDA) 
(03/07/2021) (CyHi confirms that Kanye has resumed work on the album)
Available Length: With new inspiration to work on an album dedicated to his mother, Kanye continued working on previous demos and new ideas. The music of this era reflects Donda's impact on Kanye in a colorful sound while reflecting his mania and the stress he was going through focusing on his businesses while also running for President. With multiple failed release dates for the album, Kanye went into silence in early 2021, finishing up tracks until the album morphed into something very different.

Name: Donda [V3]
Notes:
(07/09/2021) (Malik Yusef posts about a change in sound direction for the album)
(08/29/2021) (Donda officially releases)
(11/15/2021) (Donda (Deluxe) officially releases)
Available Length: Almost a year after the initial announcement of Donda, a Beats by Dre ad revealed that a listening party would take place at the Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta. It happened, but the album didn't drop. Kanye moved into the stadium and lived there until the second listening event two weeks later. Once again, the album did not release. Ye later announced a third listening party at Soldier Field in Chicago, with the album coming the next day. It didn't. The album ended up releasing on August 29th, 2021 at 8AM EST, almost two days after the final listening party.

Name:
Donda 2
(For The Children, Donda 2: 4 Da Kidz)
Notes:
(11/15/2021) (Ye releases Donda (Deluxe))
(10/03/2022) (Ye wears the White Lives Matter shirt)
Available Length: Donda 2 was announced by Ye via Instagram, being executive produced by Future. Ye then proceeded to get into many significant controversies. He hosted a listening party for it in Miami, in which many of the tracks were unfinished. It was released on the Stem Player a few days later, but it was still incomplete. Months later, Ye got into even more controversies, making him get dropped by Adidas, buy the social media Parler, and lose his billionaire status following his proclaiming "White Lives Matter" at Yeezy Season 9.

Name: Donda 2: For The Children
Notes:
OG Filename: Mike Dean - All Versions of Songs
Copy made the day before Donda 2's intended release of 2/22/22. According to American, almost every song has production added from MIKE DEAN. Snippet pack leaked November 8th, 2024, with the full copy leaking November 21st.

Name: Donda 2 (2.22.22 V1)
Notes:
OG Filename: DONDA 2 - 2-22-22 V1
Earlier copy intended to be played at the Miami LP. Uses slightly earlier versions of "Flowers", "Sci-Fi", "Security", and "Too Easy" compared to the final setlist. Leaked February 18th, 2026.

Name: Donda 2 (2.22.22 V2)
Notes:
OG Filename: DONDA 2 - 2-22-22 V2
Copy played at the Miami LP for Donda 2. Leaked February 18th, 2026.

Name: Donda 2 [Stem Player]
Notes: OG files for the most recent Donda 2 stem player copy except for the updated "Flowers" from late 2022. "True Love", the latest bounced song, is dated February 25th.

Name: Donda 2
Notes:
OG Filename: Donda 2 Tracklist - 2022-03-21
Copy of Donda 2 from March 21st, 2022. Very similar to the released Stem Player copy, with finished/updated versions of songs added as well as slight tracklist restructures.

Name: 2022 GOOD Fridays
Notes:
OG Filename: GF Mixes from Mike Dean
In April 2022, Kanye planned to do another series of G.O.O.D. Fridays single releases. Songs considered for the release were "True Love," "530," "We Did It Kid", and "Pablo," all mixed by MIKE DEAN.

Name:
WAR
(Collaboration with James Blake)
(Donda 3)
Notes:
(04/01/2022) (The project is conceived)
(??/??/2023) (The album is scrapped)
Available Length: A collaborative project between Ye and James Blake. Sessions for the project began around April 2022. On his third Drink Champs interview, Ye referred to these sessions as work for "their album". Three songs from the project were played at a party featured on Naomi Campbell's Instagram, with the song "What I Would Have Said At Virgil's Funeral" being previewed in full at YZY Season 9 shortly thereafter. The project was presumably scrapped in the wake of Ye's numerous antisemitic comments.

Name: WAR
Notes: According to dondasvault, there is "a copy of roughly 10 tracks + stems, freestyles and refs". This album copy apparently has "several finished songs", however info from the seller is inconsistent.

Name: WAR
Notes: October 2022 copy of WAR bought track-by-track in a series of charity fundraisers.

Name:
VULTURES 1
(Collaboration with Ty Dolla $ign as ¥$)
(Vultures)
Notes:
(10/28/2023) (The name of the project is changed from BBPB to VULTURES 1)
(02/10/2024) (VULTURES 1 officially releases)
Available Length: After the album's name change from Bad Bitch Playbook Vol. 1 to VULTURES 1, four listening parties were scheduled between December 12th, 2023, and February 9h, 2024. In 2024, Ye announced that VULTURES would be a trilogy, with the first installment dropping on February 9th, followed by the second and third albums in March and April. VULTURES 1 would end up being released on February 10tth, the day after the final listening party.

Name:
VULTURES
(prod. will.i.am)
Notes: According to Ty in an interview, a copy of VULTURES produced by will.i.am exists. Unknown what songs are present besides "Everybody" and "So Good".

Name: Vultures Vol. 1
Notes: Early version of Vultures. Leaked July 31st, 2024. The files fade out due to being the OG iTunes uploads that were placeholders. "Unlock" ("Talking") and "Drunk" ("Forever Rollin'") are just incorrent names.

Name: VULTURES VOL.1/2
Notes: Combined 39-track copy of songs from VULTURES 1 & 2. Folder posted to SHDØW's Instagram Story.

Name: VULTURES 1
Notes: Copy of VULTURES 1 sent through email after purchasing the digital download. Identical to the initial release except for the slightly different tagging, though some files have leftover metadata from when they were exported.

Name: VULTURES 1
Notes:
OG Filename: Vultures Mastering upload Revised
Post-release of VULTURES 1 with updated mixes from London on da Track. Leaked October 17th, 2024. Has file dates ranging from February 8th to February 12th.

Name: VULTURES 1
Notes:
OG Filename: New Masters
Later copy with updated mixes from London on da Track. Leaked October 17th, 2024. Has new mixes for "BACK TO ME", "BEG FORGIVENESS", "CARNIVAL", "HOODRAT", "KING", and "PAID". Has file dates ranging from February 12th to March 3rd.

Name:
VULTURES 2
(Collaboration with Ty Dolla $ign as ¥$)
(Vultures Vol. 2)
Notes:
(02/10/2024) (VULTURES 1 officially releases)
(08/03/2024) (VULTURES 2 officially releases)
(11/10/2024) (VULTURES 2 receives its last update)
Available Length: VULTURES 2 was announced alongside 2 other volumes of VULTURES, and was meant to release on March 8th, 2024, and then May 3rd, 2024. This album would've became the first release exclusive to the YZYAPP. The cover shows Ty Dolla $ign holding a portrait of his brother Big TC, who is currently in prison. After the album failed to drop on May 3rd, 2024, the direction of the project completely shifted, and was to be censored. The album failed to drop August 2nd and then dropped August 3rd with questionable mixing/songs.

Name: VULTURES 2
Notes: Phoenix LP copy for VULTURES 2. Was missing track 4, which is "PAY PER VIEW". Leaked October 21st, 2024. "PAY PER VIEW" later leaked November 3rd, 2024.

Name: VULTURES 2
Notes: Wes Singerman & taydex Copy of VULTURES 2.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1]
Notes: Release day one copy of VULTURES 2. Terrible excuse for an album.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.1]
Notes: Has some mixing changes to a couple songs and a name change for "MAYBE" to now be "FOREVER", it is also shorter. "SKY CITY" also has a new mix and less AI isolated drums / Ty vocals. "FRIED" & "FIELD TRIP" now also have new mixes. Full changelog here.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.2]
Notes: "530" now is CDQ and has a new mix with chimpunk vocals on the beatswitch. "RIVER" now also has the cash sound effect removed, Pierre drums again at Thug's part and a new mix. "FRIED" also has new unmixed adlibs. "FIELD TRIP" has a new mix and so does "DEAD". "SKY CITY" also has the AI vocals mixed better with better reverb and delay. Full changelog here.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.3]
Notes: Has changes to "DEAD" and "FRIED".

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.4]
Notes: Changes "MY SOUL" and "FRIED". Full changelog here.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.5]
Notes: "MY SOUL" has a rearranged order of verses, vocals are no longer panned to the left and production is different on outro.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.6]
Notes: Part of the VULTURES 2 DIGITAL DELUXE 1. Adds "TAKE OFF YOUR DRESS" as Track 17.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.7]
Notes: Clean version with mix updates for every song apart from "BOMB" and a new tracklist order. Also removes "HUSBAND" and "ISABELLA" off of "LIFESTYLE".

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.8.1]
Notes: Part of the VULTURES 2 DIGITAL DELUXE 2. Adds "BELIEVER" as Track 17.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.8.2]
Notes: Part of the VULTURES 2 DIGITAL DELUXE 3. Adds "DRUNK" as Track 17.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.8.3]
Notes: Part of the VULTURES 2 DIGITAL DELUXE 4. Adds "GUN TO MY HEAD" as Track 17.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.8.4]
Notes: Part of the VULTURES 2 DIGITAL DELUXE 5. Adds "CAN U BE" as Track 17.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.9]
Notes: Part of the VULTURES 2 DIGITAL DELUXE 5. Adds an updated "CAN U BE" with an updated mix, alternate Ty$ lyrics, and new AI Kanye vocals that replace most of the Ty$ near the end of the song. Track 17.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.10]
Notes: Tracklist updated to match V1.7, however still has the old versions without the newest mixes. "LIFESTYLE" is still unfixed and has "HUSBAND" and "ISABELLA".

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.11]
Notes: Has updated mixes by IRKO and the fixes from V1.7. "FOREVER" also now has AI Kanye vocals.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V1.12]
Notes: YouTube Music version of the Deluxe. "RIVER" and "MY SOUL" are shorter, and "FIELD TRIP" has more on time Carti vocals. Also has some of the deluxe tracks.

Name: VULTURES 2 [Release V2.0]
Notes:
This is the current version on streaming, for both clean and explicit.

"TIME MOVING SLOW" - Cruza drums removed
"FIELD TRIP" - Playboi Carti verse is now on beat
"FRIED" - New mix, significantly louder claps and synths.
"530" - Mumble replaced with an AI verse and Ty punch-ins.
"BOMB" - Yuno Miles feature added
"RIVER" - Outro shortened
"LIFESTYLE" - Mix changes
"MY SOUL" - Slight mix changes

[Huge shoutouts to ben3759 and son! for helping with all these archived versions]

Name: BULLY
Notes:
(11/??/2023) (YEBU is shelved in favor of Vultures)
(06/15/2025) (BULLY misses its intended release date of North's birthday)
(Ongoing)
Available Length: On September 3rd, 2024, the CEO of Channel Candy, Ye's new touring company, confirmed that work on a new solo Ye album had began after the South Korea Vultures listening experience. On September 28th, 2024, on the second Haikou listening event, Ye confirmed that the album name is Bully, which references the movie with the same name that he posted on his Instagram story a few days prior to the event. On January 2nd, 2025, Ye announced the album would have AI on it after months of speculation, and that it could help AI become used more in music. After the release of Bully V1, Ye confirms his intention to re-record the AI on Bully, and stated it was being mixed.

Name: BULLY
Notes: October copy of the album. Has alternate reference tracks. The only real vocals–excluding those used on other copies–are an unused hook for "Can't Hurry Love".

Name: BULLY
Notes: November copy of the album.

Name: BULLY [IRKO Mixes]
Notes: Copy fully mixed by IRKO.

Name: BULLY
Notes: December copy of the album. Rearranges the tracklist and adds "Losing Your Mind" and "Melrose".

Name: BULLY
Notes:
OG Filename: SAVE COPIES OF BULLY
January copy of the visual album. Folder opened by DJ Fai on a stream with Ty Dolla $ign after the chat asked him to play "This One Here". Files have a modification date of February, although all their filenames state they were made in January.

Name: BULLY
Notes: Copy played to The Legendary Traxster in February 2025.

Name: BULLY
Notes: Copy intended to be released on streaming July 25th, 2025.

Name:
CUCK
(CUKKK, WW3)
Notes:
(03/06/2025) (Ye announces that the album has a new "antisemitic sound")
(05/18/2025) (CUCK leaks in full)
(06/22/2025) (Ye announces the name change to "IN A PERFECT WORLD")
Available Length: On March 6th, 2025, Ye tweeted, "this next album got that antisemitic sound" and "my new sound called antisemitic". This would mark a shift in Ye's soundscape, as his antisemitic ideas had been mostly contained to his Twitter at that time, besides a few one-off remarks about Jews on the VULTURES albums. On March 16th, 2025, Ye would tweet an image of a red swastika against a black background, declaring it as a "NEW ALBUM COVER". On April 2nd. 2025, DJ Akademiks would post a series of Tweets that eventually led to the announcement of a new album titled WW3, separating this project from BULLY.

Name: WW3 [Dave Blunts Reference Tracks]
Notes: Album copy containing the majority of Dave Blunts' reference tracks for CUCK. Dated March 28th, 2025, though most references were made prior.

Name: WW3
Notes:
OG Filename: WW3
Work folder mentioned in the metadata for several Logic Pro sessions. Mostly consists of stems and early mixes. Confirmed to have "COUSINS", "HITLER YE JESUS", "JARED", and "WW3".

Name: CUCK
Notes: Heavily passed CUCK copy owned by several different people, most notably Azealia Banks. Only known tracks are "Dirty Magazines" and "Cosby", but most tracks from other copies are likely on it.

Name: CUCK V2
Notes: iTunes tracklist posted by Ye to Twitter April 28th, 2025.

CUCK

Name:
CUCK
(prod. NoiseOfCory)

Name: CUCK
Notes: Album copy for the blind groupbuy version of CUCK. According to the seller, the copy is from about 2 weeks ago (as of May 19th, 2025). Most OG files leaked January 18th, 2026, with the latest file date being April 30th, 2025.

Name:
CUCK
(prod. The Legendary Traxster)
Notes: Folder with alternate production from Traxster, mentioned during a February 2026 Digital Nas livestream.

Name: CUCK [CyHi Reference Tracks]
Notes: Copy with 14 of CyHi's reference tracks, said to exist by crave (Elijah).

Name:
DONDA 2 (2025)
(PABLO 2)
Notes:
(03/??/2024) (Traxster talks to Mike Dean in a leaked phone call about putting Donda 2 on DSPs)
(04/29/2025) (The 2025 version of DONDA 2 is officially released onto DSPs)
(02/13/2026) (The 2025 version of DONDA 2 receives its last update)
Available Length: After releasing Donda 2 via the Stem Player in 2022, Ye would eventually move onto other projects. However, the project never left his mind, with some songs continuing to be considered in the Vultures era. 2025 would see Ye enter a new era of creative fuel, once again working on multiple projects at once. With plans to release BULLY and CUCK, Ye also spoke of plans to "officially" release Donda 2, repeatedly saying he planned to rerecord verses and upload a "finished" version of the album.

Name: DONDA 2 [IRKO Mixes]
Notes: Album copy fully mixed by IRKO using the Stem Player stems. The only song leaked from this copy is "GET LOST".

Name: DONDA 2 [Release V1]
Notes: Initial release copy of DONDA 2.

Name: DONDA 2 [Release V1.1]
Notes: Second release copy of DONDA 2. Adds "JESSE" and "SUZY". "LORD LIFT" got renamed to "LORD LIFT ME UP", "FIRST TIME" got renamed to "FIRST TIME IN A LONG TIME", and "MR MIAGI" got renamed to "MR MIYAGI" and has a different intro. "HAPPY" has an AI Ye verse and is shorter. "LOUIE BAGS" Has added AI Ye verses, updated drums, and more delay on the intro.

Name: DONDA 2 [May 2 Copy]
Notes: Copy of DONDA 2 from May 2nd, 2025. Likely made for the Scrybe release of the album, as this copy adds "CITY OF CHI", which was originally exclusive to the platform. Leaked May 9th, 2025, as a bonus for the failed "Pre-2016 Many Wanted Songs" groupbuy.

Name: DONDA 2 [Release V1.2]
Notes: Third release copy of DONDA 2. Adds "CITY OF CHI". "FIRST TIME IN A LONG TIME" has updated AI vocals.

Name: DONDA 2 [Release V1.3]
Notes: Fourth release copy of DONDA 2. Removes the DJ Akademiks intro from "SECURITY".

Name: DONDA 2 [Release V1.4]
Notes: Fifth release copy of DONDA 2. Removes the vocal sample from "FLOWERS".
